creator: eric@xinuos.com
text:
Hi Friends,

We have created the first FreeBSD user Group in South Africa. First meeting is on November 26th, 2015 at Rusty Hook, 22 Wilge Street, Honeydew, Johannesburg.

Please refer to 
https://www.facebook.com/events/1522359224741864/
http://www.meetup.com/Xinuos-FreeBSD-User-Group-XinuosBUG-ZA/events/226725763/
and
https://plus.google.com/events/cdrspmc6cve519nkc61bf7sfc30
for details

Spread the word, please. From initial responses, we expect a material turnout (30 or more). For this first meeting, Xinuos is providing the drinks and the pizzas. The event is also advertised in the local press.

Best regards

Eric le Blan
Director
Xinuos, inc.
